Watching.definition: the act of observing; taking a patient look

Tv.definition: an electronic device that receives television signals and displays them on a screen

Movie.definition: a form of entertainment that enacts a story by sound and a sequence of images giving the illusion of continuous movement

Series.definition: similar things placed in order or happening one after another

Cartoon.definition: a humorous or satirical drawing published in a newspaper or magazine

Couch.definition: an upholstered seat for more than one person

Sofa.definition: an upholstered seat for more than one person

Bed.definition: a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

Sitting.definition: the act of assuming or maintaining a seated position

Lying.definition: the deliberate act of deviating from the truth
be lying, be prostrate; be in a horizontal position

Relaxing.definition: become less tense, rest, or take one's ease

Chilling.definition: the process of becoming cooler; a falling temperature

Reading.definition: the cognitive process of understanding a written linguistic message
interpret something that is written or printed

Blanket.definition: bedding that keeps a person warm in bed

Laptop.definition: a portable computer small enough to use in your lap

Headphones.definition: electro-acoustic transducer for converting electric signals into sounds; it is held over or inserted into the ear

Popcorn.definition: corn having small ears and kernels that burst when exposed to dry heat
small kernels of corn exploded by heat

Cuddling.definition: move or arrange oneself in a comfortable and cozy position
hold (a person or thing) close, as for affection, comfort, or warmth

Lounge.definition: an upholstered seat for more than one person
a room (as in a hotel or airport) with seating where people can wait

Evening.definition: the latter part of the day (the period of decreasing daylight from late afternoon until nightfall)

Weekend.definition: a time period usually extending from Friday night through Sunday; more loosely defined as any period of successive days including one and only one Sunday
